channel.title: Court on Adventures in Data Science
channel.description: Recent content in Court on Adventures in Data Science

item.title: Data, Math, Coding, Politics?
item.description: Getting my hands on the data to begin this project has been exceptionally difficult. In addition to the regular issues within a department such as mine, we have an added layer of bureaucracy in our overseeing agency. In short, there are three gatekeepers of our juvenile court data: Our data people, our contractor, and the state agency that signs the contracts. Each department has their own concerns and regulations regarding this data.

item.title: Teaching the Basic of Data
item.description: The best part of my job at the court is that I have the freedom to learn whatever I want, as long as I am able to turn it into a relevant training. To that end, I’ve attempted to distill what I’ve learned over the past two years into something that would help my coworkers understand what it means to be data driven. The attached training stresses the fundamentals in a fairly lighthearted way, and lays the ground work for additional trainings.
